title.zh: 《Business Model Generation / 商业模式新生代》

summary.en: The foundational Strategyzer handbook behind Business Model Canvas: nine building blocks, recurring model patterns, visual design techniques, strategy questions, and a process for moving from idea to model.
summary.zh: Business Model Canvas 背后的基础手册：用九大模块描述商业模式，并系统介绍模式类型、视觉设计方法、战略提问和从想法到模型的设计流程。

recommendation.en: Read this first when a team is still treating BMC as a blank form. It explains what each block means, how the blocks work as a system, and how patterns such as Long Tail, Multi-Sided Platforms, Free, Open, and Unbundling change the model logic.
recommendation.zh: 当团队还只是把 BMC 当作空白表格填写时，优先读这本。它讲清九大模块如何构成系统，并解释长尾、多边平台、免费、开放、拆分等模式如何改变商业逻辑。

sources.label: Alexander Osterwalder & Yves Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010
Strategyzer · Business Model Generation book page
